kw.name: Remove All Items From Cart
kw.doc: Deletes every item from the cart by clicking each <a class="cart_quantity_delete"> link one by one. After each click waits 1.5s for the row to animate out, then recounts rows and repeats until 0 remain.

kw.name: Verify Cart Is Empty
kw.doc: The site shows <span id="empty_cart"> after all items deleted. Waits up to 10s for it to become visible.

kw.name: Remove All Items From Cart
kw.doc: Deletes every item from the cart by clicking each <a class="cart_quantity_delete"> link one by one. After each click waits 1.5s for the row to animate out, then recounts rows and repeats until 0 remain.

kw.name: Verify Cart Is Empty
kw.doc: The site shows <span id="empty_cart"> after all items deleted. Waits up to 10s for it to become visible.
